name: Tex-Mex Caviar
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped sweet green bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain the frozen black-eyed peas.
2. Thaw the peas, if necessary.
3. Mix the thawed peas with the chopped sweet red pepper, sweet green bell pepper, red onion, chopped fresh jalapeno pepper, chopped parsley, and Italian dressing.
